components.name: Master
components.description: asyncio event loop entry point; coordinates startup, shutdown, addon loading, and flow replay

components.name: Options / OptManager
components.description: Typed options store with change notification; shared across all addons

components.name: AddonManager
components.description: Registers, configures, and dispatches lifecycle hook events to all addons

components.name: Proxy Server
components.description: Accepts client TCP connections, drives the layer pipeline, handles server connections

components.name: Protocol Layers
components.description: Stateful protocol processors stacked per connection: TLS, HTTP/1, HTTP/2, WebSocket, DNS, QUIC

components.name: Built-in Addons
components.description: Core behaviors: intercept, flow store, content decode, dump, export, DNS resolver

components.name: Tornado App
components.description: REST API handlers for flows, options, content views, and flow file import/export

components.name: WebSocket Relay
components.description: Pushes real-time flow events to connected browser clients via /updates

components.name: WebAuth Addon
components.description: Optional HTTP Basic authentication middleware for the web interface

external_systems.name: mitmproxy_rs
external_systems.description: Rust extension providing WireGuard transport, local redirect modes, and UDP/DNS handling

external_systems.name: Target HTTP Server
external_systems.description: The upstream server whose traffic is being intercepted and proxied

relationships.description: Creates and triggers lifecycle events on addon manager
Sets up proxy server via proxyserver addon during startup
Feeds connection events into the layer pipeline
Triggers request/response/error hooks with flow objects
Dispatches hook events to registered built-in addons
Delegates WireGuard and local redirect transport
Opens upstream connections and forwards traffic
Reads and mutates flows, calls commands, updates options
Subscribes to flow lifecycle events for real-time push to browser
